verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque David : Hæc est domus Dei, et hoc altare in holocaustum Israëli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֔יד זֶ֣ה ה֔וּא בֵּ֖ית יְהֹוָ֣ה הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְזֶה־מִּזְבֵּ֥חַ לְעֹלָ֖ה לְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then David said: This is the house of God, And this is the altar for the holocaust of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David sanoi: tässä pitää oleman Herran huone, ja tämä alttari Israelin polttouhria varten.
verses.king_james: Then David said, This is the house of the Lord God, and this is the altar of the burnt offering for Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præcepit ut congregarentur omnes proselyti de terra Israël, et constituit ex eis latomos ad cædendos lapides et poliendos, ut ædificaretur domus Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֔יד לִכְנוֹס֙ אֶת־הַגֵּרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּאֶ֣רֶץ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיַּעֲמֵ֣ד חֹצְבִ֗ים לַחְצוֹב֙ אַבְנֵ֣י גָזִ֔ית לִבְנ֖וֹת בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he commanded to gather together all the proselytes of the land of Israel, and out of them he appointed stonecutters to hew stones and polish them, to build the house of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David käski koota muukalaiset, jotka Israelin maalla olivat: ne asetti hän kivien vuoliaksi, vuolemaan kiviä Jumalan huoneen rakennukseksi.
verses.king_james: And David commanded to gather together the strangers that were in the land of Israel; and he set masons to hew wrought stones to build the house of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ferrum quoque plurimum ad clavos januarum, et ad commissuras atque juncturas, præparavit David : et æris pondus innumerabile.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַרְזֶ֣ל ׀ לָ֠רֹ֠ב לַֽמִּסְמְרִ֞ים לְדַלְת֧וֹת הַשְּׁעָרִ֛ים וְלַֽמְחַבְּר֖וֹת הֵכִ֣ין דָּוִ֑יד וּנְחֹ֥שֶׁת לָרֹ֖ב אֵ֥ין מִשְׁקָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David prepared in abundance iron for the nails of the gates, and for the closures and joinings: and of brass an immense weight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David valmisti paljon rautaa porttein ovien nauloiksi, ja mitä yhteen naulittaa tarvittiin, ja niin paljo vaskea, ettei se punnittaa taidettu;
verses.king_james: And David prepared iron in abundance for the nails for the doors of the gates, and for the joinings; and brass in abundance without weight;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ligna quoque cedrina non poterant æstimari, quæ Sidonii et Tyrii deportaverant ad David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲצֵ֥י אֲרָזִ֖ים לְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּ֑ר כִּֽי־הֵ֠בִ֠יאוּ הַצִּידֹנִ֨ים וְהַצֹּרִ֜ים עֲצֵ֧י אֲרָזִ֛ים לָרֹ֖ב לְדָוִֽיד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the cedar trees were without number, which the Sidonians, and Tyrians brought to David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sedripuita epäluvun; sillä Sidonilaiset ja Tyrolaiset toivat paljon sedripuita Davidille.
verses.king_james: Also cedar trees in abundance: for the Zidonians and they of Tyre brought much cedar wood to David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit David : Solomon filius meus puer parvulus est et delicatus : domus autem, quam ædificari volo Domino, talis esse debet ut in cunctis regionibus nominetur : præparabo ergo ei necessaria. Et ob hanc causam ante mortem suam omnes præparavit impensas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֗יד שְׁלֹמֹ֣ה בְנִי֮ נַ֣עַר וָרָךְ֒ וְהַבַּ֜יִת לִבְנ֣וֹת לַֽיהֹוָ֗ה לְהַגְדִּ֨יל ׀ לְמַ֜עְלָה לְשֵׁ֤ם וּלְתִפְאֶ֙רֶת֙ לְכׇל־הָ֣אֲרָצ֔וֹת אָכִ֥ינָה נָּ֖א ל֑וֹ וַיָּ֧כֶן דָּוִ֛יד לָרֹ֖ב לִפְנֵ֥י מוֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said: Solomon my son is very young and tender, and the house which I would have to be built to the Lord, must be such as to be renowned in all countries: therefore I will prepare him necessaries. And therefore before his death he prepared all the charges.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David ajatteli: minun poikani Salomo on nuori ja heikko, mutta huone, joka pitää Herralle rakettaman, pitää niin suuri oleman, että sen nimi ja kunnia korotetaan kaikissa maissa; sentähden valmistan minä nyt hänelle varaksi. Näin valmisti David paljon ennen kuolemaansa.
verses.king_james: And David said, Solomon my son is young and tender, and the house that is to be builded for the Lord must be exceeding magnifical, of fame and of glory throughout all countries: I will therefore now make preparation for it. So David prepared abundantly before his death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavitque Salomonem filium suum, et præcepit ei ut ædificaret domum Domino Deo Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֖א לִשְׁלֹמֹ֣ה בְנ֑וֹ וַיְצַוֵּ֙הוּ֙ לִבְנ֣וֹת בַּ֔יִת לַיהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he called for Solomon his son: and commanded him to build a house to the Lord the God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän kutsui poikansa Salomon ja käski hänen rakentaa huoneen Herralle Israelin Jumalalle.
verses.king_james: Then he called for Solomon his son, and charged him to build an house for the Lord God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque David ad Salomonem : Fili mi, voluntatis meæ fuit ut ædificarem domum nomini Domini Dei mei :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר דָּוִ֖יד לִשְׁלֹמֹ֑ה (בנו) [בְּנִ֕י] אֲנִי֙ הָיָ֣ה עִם־לְבָבִ֔י לִבְנ֣וֹת בַּ֔יִת לְשֵׁ֖ם יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said to Solomon: My son, it was my desire to have built a house to the name of the Lord my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David sanoi Salomolle: poikani, minun mieleni oli rakentaa Herralle minun Jumalalleni huonetta;
verses.king_james: And David said to Solomon, My son, as for me, it was in my mind to build an house unto the name of the Lord my God:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens : Multum sanguinem effudisti, et plurima bella bellasti : non poteris ædificare domum nomini meo, tanto effuso sanguine coram me :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י עָלַ֤י דְּבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר דָּ֤ם לָרֹב֙ שָׁפַ֔כְתָּ וּמִלְחָמ֥וֹת גְּדֹל֖וֹת עָשִׂ֑יתָ לֹא־תִבְנֶ֥ה בַ֙יִת֙ לִשְׁמִ֔י כִּ֚י דָּמִ֣ים רַבִּ֔ים שָׁפַ֥כְתָּ אַ֖רְצָה לְפָנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the word of the Lord came to me, saying: Thou hast shed much blood, and fought many battles, so thou cannot not build house to my name, after shedding so much blood before me:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herran sana tuli minun tyköni ja sanoi: sinä olet paljon verta vuodattanut ja suurta sotaa pitänyt; sentähden ei sinun pidä rakentaman minun nimelleni huonetta, ettäs niin paljon verta olet vuodattanut maan päälle minun edessäni.
verses.king_james: But the word of the Lord came to me, saying, Thou hast shed blood abundantly, and hast made great wars: thou shalt not build an house unto my name, because thou hast shed much blood upon the earth in my sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: filius qui nascetur tibi, erit vir quietissimus : faciam enim eum requiescere ab omnibus inimicis suis per circuitum : et ob hanc causam Pacificus vocabitur : et pacem et otium dabo in Israël cunctis diebus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה־בֵ֞ן נוֹלָ֣ד לָ֗ךְ ה֤וּא יִֽהְיֶה֙ אִ֣ישׁ מְנוּחָ֔ה וַהֲנִיח֥וֹתִי ל֛וֹ מִכׇּל־אוֹיְבָ֖יו מִסָּבִ֑יב כִּ֤י שְׁלֹמֹה֙ יִֽהְיֶ֣ה שְׁמ֔וֹ וְשָׁל֥וֹם וָשֶׁ֛קֶט אֶתֵּ֥ן עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּיָמָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son, that shall be born to thee, shall be a most quiet man: for I will make him rest from all his enemies round about: and therefore he shall be called Peaceable: and I will give peace and quietness to Israel all his days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, poika, joka sinulle syntyy, on oleva levollinen mies; sillä minä annan levon kaikilta vihollisiltansa hänen ympärillänsä: sentähden pitää hänen nimensä oleman Salomo; sillä minä annan rauhan ja levon Israelille hänen elinaikanansa.
verses.king_james: Behold, a son shall be born to thee, who shall be a man of rest; and I will give him rest from all his enemies round about: for his name shall be Solomon, and I will give peace and quietness unto Israel in his days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse ædificabit domum nomini meo, et ipse erit mihi in filium, et ego ero illi in patrem : firmaboque solium regni ejus super Israël in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֽוּא־יִבְנֶ֥ה בַ֙יִת֙ לִשְׁמִ֔י וְהוּא֙ יִֽהְיֶה־לִּ֣י לְבֵ֔ן וַאֲנִי־ל֖וֹ לְאָ֑ב וַהֲכִ֨ינוֹתִ֜י כִּסֵּ֧א מַלְכוּת֛וֹ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall build a house to my name, and he shall be a son to me, and I will be a father to him: and I will establish the throne of his kingdom over Israel for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen pitää rakentaman minun nimelleni huoneen, hänen pitää oleman minun poikani, ja minä olen hänen isänsä: ja minä vahvistan hänen valtakuntansa istuimen Israelissa ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: He shall build an house for my name; and he shall be my son, and I will be his father; and I will establish the throne of his kingdom over Israel for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo fili mi, sit Dominus tecum, et prosperare, et ædifica domum Domino Deo tuo sicut locutus est de te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֣ה בְנִ֔י יְהִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה עִמָּ֑ךְ וְהִצְלַחְתָּ֗ וּבָנִ֙יתָ֙ בֵּ֚ית יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר דִּבֶּ֥ר עָלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now then, my son, the Lord be with thee, and do thou prosper, and build the house to the Lord thy God, as he hath spoken of thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin on nyt, minun poikani, Herra sinun kanssas: sinä menestyt ja rakennat Herralle sinun Jumalalles huoneen, niinkuin hän sinusta puhunut on.
verses.king_james: Now, my son, the Lord be with thee; and prosper thou, and build the house of the Lord thy God, as he hath said of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Det quoque Dominus prudentiam et sensum ut regere possis Israël, et custodire legem Domini Dei tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ יִֽתֶּן־לְךָ֤ יְהֹוָה֙ שֵׂ֣כֶל וּבִינָ֔ה וִֽיצַוְּךָ֖ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלִשְׁמ֕וֹר אֶת־תּוֹרַ֖ת יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord also give thee wisdom and understanding, that thou mayest be able to rule Israel, and to keep the law of the Lord thy God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin antakoon Herra sinulle ymmärryksen ja toimen, ja asettakoon sinun Israelia hallitsemaan ja pitämään Herran sinun Jumalas lain!
verses.king_james: Only the Lord give thee wisdom and understanding, and give thee charge concerning Israel, that thou mayest keep the law of the Lord thy God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc enim proficere poteris, si custodieris mandata et judicia quæ præcepit Dominus Moysi ut doceret Israël. Confortare, et viriliter age : ne timeas, neque paveas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֣ז תַּצְלִ֔יחַ אִם־תִּשְׁמ֗וֹר לַֽעֲשׂוֹת֙ אֶת־הַחֻקִּ֣ים וְאֶת־הַמִּשְׁפָּטִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֖ה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל חֲזַ֣ק וֶאֱמָ֔ץ אַל־תִּירָ֖א וְאַל־תֵּחָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: For then thou shalt be able to prosper, if thou keep the commandments, and judgments, which the Lord commanded Moses to teach Israel: take courage and act manfully, fear not, nor be dismayed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sinä menestyt, koskas ahkeroitset pitää niitä säätyjä ja oikeuksia, jotka Herra Moseksen kautta on käskenyt Israelille. Ole vahva ja hyvässä turvassa, älä pelkää, älä myös vavahdu.
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou prosper, if thou takest heed to fulfil the statutes and judgments which the Lord charged Moses with concerning Israel: be strong, and of good courage; dread not, nor be dismayed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego in paupertate mea præparavi impensas domus Domini, auri talenta centum millia, et argenti mille millia talentorum : æris vero et ferri non est pondus, vincitur enim numerus magnitudine ; ligna et lapides præparavi ad universa impendia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֨ה בְעׇנְיִ֜י הֲכִינ֣וֹתִי לְבֵית־יְהֹוָ֗ה זָהָ֞ב כִּכָּרִ֤ים מֵֽאָה־אֶ֙לֶף֙ וְכֶ֗סֶף אֶ֤לֶף אֲלָפִים֙ כִּכָּרִ֔ים וְלַנְּחֹ֤שֶׁת וְלַבַּרְזֶל֙ אֵ֣ין מִשְׁקָ֔ל כִּ֥י לָרֹ֖ב הָיָ֑ה וְעֵצִ֤ים וַֽאֲבָנִים֙ הֲכִינ֔וֹתִי וַעֲלֵיהֶ֖ם תּוֹסִֽיף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold I in my poverty have prepared the charges of the house of the Lord, of gold a hundred thousand talents, and of silver a million of talents: but of brass, and of iron there is no weight, for the abundance surpasseth all account: timber also and stones I have prepared for all the charges.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minä olen vaivassani valmistanut Herran huoneesen satatuhatta leiviskää kultaa ja tuhannen kertaa tuhannen leiviskää hopiaa, niin myös vaskea ja rautaa määrättömästi (sillä niitä on ylen paljo): minä olen myös toimittanut hirsiä ja kiviä, joihin vielä lisätä taidat.
verses.king_james: Now, behold, in my trouble I have prepared for the house of the Lord an hundred thousand talents of gold, and a thousand thousand talents of silver; and of brass and iron without weight; for it is in abundance: timber also and stone have I prepared; and thou mayest add thereto.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habes quoque plurimos artifices, latomos, et cæmentarios, artificesque lignorum, et omnium artium ad faciendum opus prudentissimos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעִמְּךָ֤ לָרֹב֙ עֹשֵׂ֣י מְלָאכָ֔ה חֹצְבִ֕ים וְחָרָשֵׁ֥י אֶ֖בֶן וָעֵ֑ץ וְכׇל־חָכָ֖ם בְּכׇל־מְלָאכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast also workmen in abundance, hewers of stones, and masons, and carpenters, and of all trades the most skilful in their work,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin on sinulla paljo työntekiöitä, kivenhakkaajia ja puuseppiä, ja kaikkia taitavia kaikkinaisiin töihin.
verses.king_james: Moreover there are workmen with thee in abundance, hewers and workers of stone and timber, and all manner of cunning men for every manner of work.

verses.latin_vulgate: in auro et argento et ære et ferro, cujus non est numerus. Surge igitur et fac, et erit Dominus tecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַזָּהָ֥ב לַכֶּ֛סֶף וְלַנְּחֹ֥שֶׁת וְלַבַּרְזֶ֖ל אֵ֣ין מִסְפָּ֑ר ק֣וּם וַעֲשֵׂ֔ה וִיהִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In gold, and in silver, and in brass, and in iron, whereof there is no number. Arise then, and be doing, and the Lord will be with thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kullalla, hopialla, vaskella ja raudalla ei ole lukua: nouse siis ja tee se, Herra on sinun kanssas.
verses.king_james: Of the gold, the silver, and the brass, and the iron, there is no number. Arise therefore, and be doing, and the Lord be with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepit quoque David cunctis principibus Israël ut adjuvarent Salomonem filium suum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֤ו דָּוִיד֙ לְכׇל־שָׂרֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לַעְזֹ֖ר לִשְׁלֹמֹ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: David also charged all the princes of Israel, to help Solomon his son,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David käski kaikkia Israelin ylimmäisiä auttamaan poikaansa Salomoa.
verses.king_james: David also commanded all the princes of Israel to help Solomon his son, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Cernitis, inquiens, quod Dominus Deus vester vobiscum sit, et dederit vobis requiem per circuitum, et tradiderit omnes inimicos vestros in manus vestras, et subjecta sit terra coram Domino, et coram populo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֨א יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹֽהֵיכֶם֙ עִמָּכֶ֔ם וְהֵנִ֥יחַ לָכֶ֖ם מִסָּבִ֑יב כִּ֣י ׀ נָתַ֣ן בְּיָדִ֗י אֵ֚ת יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָ֔רֶץ וְנִכְבְּשָׁ֥ה הָאָ֛רֶץ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלִפְנֵ֥י עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Saying: You see, that the Lord your God is with you, and hath given you rest round about, and hath delivered all your enemies into your hands, and the land is subdued before the Lord, and before his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö Herra teidän Jumalanne ole teidän kanssanne ja ole antanut teille levon joka taholta? Sillä hän on antanut maan asujamet minun käsiini, ja maa on voitettu Herran ja hänen kansansa edessä.
verses.king_james: Is not the Lord your God with you? and hath he not given you rest on every side? for he hath given the inhabitants of the land into mine hand; and the land is subdued before the Lord, and before his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præbete igitur corda vestra et animas vestras, ut quæratis Dominum Deum vestrum : et consurgite, et ædificate sanctuarium Domino Deo, ut introducatur arca fœderis Domini, et vasa Domino consecrata, in domum quæ ædificatur nomini Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֗ה תְּנ֤וּ לְבַבְכֶם֙ וְנַפְשְׁכֶ֔ם לִדְר֖וֹשׁ לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֑ם וְק֗וּמוּ וּבְנוּ֙ אֶת־מִקְדַּשׁ֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים לְהָבִ֞יא אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֗ה וּכְלֵי֙ קֹ֣דֶשׁ הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים לַבַּ֖יִת הַנִּבְנֶ֥ה לְשֵׁם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Give therefore your hearts and your souls, to seek the Lord your God and arise, and build a sanctuary to the Lord God, that the ark of the covenant of the Lord, and the vessels consecrated to the Lord, may be brought into the house, which is built to the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden antakaat sydämenne ja sielunne etsiä Herraa teidän Jumalaanne; nouskaat ja rakentakaat Herralle Jumalalle pyhä, kannettaa siihen Herran liitonarkki ja pyhät Jumalan astiat huoneesen, joka Herran nimeen rakennetaan.
verses.king_james: Now set your heart and your soul to seek the Lord your God; arise therefore, and build ye the sanctuary of the Lord God, to bring the ark of the covenant of the Lord, and the holy vessels of God, into the house that is to be built to the name of the Lord.
